Next, I should list the necessary skills and tools. The available tools are Base_Generator_Tool, Python_Coder_Tool, Web_Search_Tool, and Wikipedia_Search_Tool.

I should check both individuals. Agatha Christie was a famous author, and Clement Greenberg was an art critic. Their death dates might be well-documented.

<answer>Agatha Christie died on January 12, 1976, while Clement Greenberg died on May 7, 1969. Therefore, Agatha Christie died later.</answer>
